title: A Key to the Exercises in A.K. Warder's 'Introduction to Pali'
pageTitle: A Key to the Exercises in A.K. Warder's 'Introduction to Pali'
author: Brahmali Bhikkhu
summary: A thoroughly annotated answer key to the exercises in A.K. Warder's classic Pali textbook. Available only in PDF format.
